content: **Ben:** I declined and closed https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/562 because Jeff's main-integration feedback required preserving Alice's accepted shell, which made the PR's app.js shape stale. I manually ported the useful clipboard/native event behavior into Ben commit 5449f59, and that work is included in merged PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/564.

**Grace:** I addressed your requested changes on PR #563: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/563. The PR now preserves the current Emma workbook baseline and has a focused 2-file delta: empty grid cells render blank while still evaluating as zero in formulas, with a regression test.

**Henry:** I found one remaining clipboard gap after your port and opened a narrow follow-up: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/570. The keydown handler was still preventing default Cmd/Ctrl+C/X/V behavior, which can block native clipboard events; this PR removes those interceptions so the native copy/cut/paste handlers are the reliable single path.
